Notes.Text:
This update for postfix fixes the following issue

- CVE-2026-43964: buffer overread and process crash via an enhanced status code that lacks text after the third number
  (bsc#1264062).

Vulnerabilities.Description: Postfix before 3.8.16, 3.9 before 3.9.10, and 3.10 before 3.10.9 sometimes allows a buffer over-read and process crash via an enhanced status code that lacks text after the third number.
